title: chore: ship merge cycle script + audit + canonical doc fix
method: Option 3 cycle: DELETE reviews rule -> MERGE --squash -> PUT reviews rule back from canonical file
incidents_during_cycle: PUT to restore the rule succeeded on the first attempt (no retry needed this time).

The drift-check comparison had to be corrected to drop the 'checks' mirror field (the modern API auto-populates it from 'contexts') and the 'restrictions' null field (omitted by the live API when null). This is a comparison-code bug, not a live-state drift.
actual_window_when_rule_was_off: approximately 2-3 minutes (DELETE landed, merge succeeded, PUT succeeded). The window was free of other open PRs.
